name: What evidence do I need for my repetitive strain work injury claim?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for my repetitive strain work injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: Doctor's Form 123 detailing how/when/where, medical records, work logs.[1] Key factors: Consistent history to physician.[1] Witness job duties.[2] Cumulative injuries covered.[2] Lawyer organizes best.[2]
